mission: AWS API Gateway CloudWatch Logs Policy Reference
purpose: Allows Amazon API Gateway service role patterns to push execution/access logs to CloudWatch Logs when attached through the appropriate AWS role configuration.
usage_boundary: This is a policy ARN reference only. It is not a credential and does not grant access by itself. Do not store AWS access keys or session tokens in repository files.
next_steps: Create or identify an IAM role for API Gateway logging.
Attach this AWS-managed policy to that role if required by the deployment pattern.
Set API Gateway account CloudWatch role ARN separately if using REST API logging.
Enable access logs/execution logs on the API stage.
Verify logs appear in CloudWatch Logs.
